title: RunLeaderboard
description: CLIENT-SAFE ranked leaderboard of configurations for one optimization run, used by the terminal-first analytics surface to answer 'which config should I pick under this objective?'. Reports the ranking basis (objective, per-measure weights, constraints) and the ranked configs (composite score, per-measure values, coarse confidence, risk flags, and a winner/candidate/reject recommendation). Composite scores and measure values are the run's own measured aggregates; this contract carries no proprietary example-scoring signals or formulas.

run_id.description: Identifier of the optimization run this leaderboard ranks.

ranking_basis.description: How the leaderboard was ranked so the operator can see the basis of the ordering.

objective.description: Name/label of the objective the ranking optimizes for.

weights.description: Per-measure weights applied in the composite objective.

constraints.description: Numeric constraints applied during ranking, keyed by constraint name (e.g. a measure name or 'max_cost').

configs.description: Configurations ordered best-first under the ranking basis.

composite_score.description: Composite objective score used to rank this configuration.

measures.description: Measured aggregate value per measure name for this configuration.

confidence.description: Coarse confidence bucket for this configuration's standing.

risk_flags.description: Client-safe risk labels for this configuration (e.g. 'few_samples', 'high_variance').
